message:
feat(calendly,coda,mastodon,hackernews): build 4 more connectors

Calendly (connectors/calendly/):
- 9 ops: events.list/get/cancel, event_types.list, invitees.list,
  scheduling_links.create, user.get, availability.list, health
- Bearer token, api.calendly.com — 71 tests

Coda (connectors/coda/):
- 10 ops: docs.list/get/create, pages.list, tables.list,
  rows.list/upsert/delete, formulas.list, health
- Bearer token, coda.io/apis/v1 — 79 tests

Mastodon (connectors/mastodon/):
- 12 ops: timeline.home/public, statuses.get/post/delete/favourite/boost,
  accounts.get/verify, notifications.list, search, health
- OAuth2 Bearer, configurable instance URL — 60 tests

Hacker News (connectors/hackernews/):
- 9 ops: item.get, user.get, top/new/best/ask/show/job_stories, health
- No auth (public API), firebase API — 64 tests

All: V3 FcpConnector, path sanitization, error propagation,
manifest.toml, doctor/self_check.

Closes beads j05nu.5.3.1/2, j05nu.5.4.1/2, j05nu.8.1.1/2, j05nu.8.2.1/2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -144,6 +144,10 @@ members = [
     "connectors/confluence",
     "connectors/zoom",
     "connectors/square",
+    "connectors/calendly",
+    "connectors/coda",
+    "connectors/mastodon",
+    "connectors/hackernews",
 ]
 
 # Default to the FCP2 platform core crates (connectors are explicitly targeted).

@@ -0,0 +1,35 @@
+[package]
+name = "fcp-calendly"
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+license.workspace = true
+publish = false
+description = "FCP Calendly connector"
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fcp-calendly"
+path = "src/main.rs"
+
+[lib]
+name = "fcp_calendly"
+path = "src/lib.rs"
+
+[dependencies]
+fcp-core.workspace = true
+fcp-sdk.workspace = true
+fcp-async-core.workspace = true
+reqwest = { workspace = true, features = ["json"] }
+serde = { workspace = true, features = ["derive"] }
+serde_json.workspace = true
+thiserror.workspace = true
+tracing.workspace = true
+tracing-subscriber = { workspace = true, features = ["env-filter", "json"] }
+async-trait.workspace = true
+sha2.workspace = true
+hex.workspace = true
+anyhow.workspace = true
+
+[dev-dependencies]
+fcp-crypto.workspace = true
+fcp-testkit.workspace = true
+wiremock.workspace = true

@@ -0,0 +1,135 @@
+[format]
+type = "fcp-connector-manifest"
+schema_version = "2.1"
+
+[connector]
+id = "fcp.calendly"
+name = "Calendly"
+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "Calendly scheduling platform connector for managing events, event types, invitees, and scheduling links"
+archetype = "operational"
+homepage = "https://developer.calendly.com/"
+
+[zones]
+home = "z:work"
+allowed_sources = ["z:work"]
+allowed_targets = ["z:work"]
+tailscale_tag = "tag:fcp-work"
+
+[capabilities]
+required = ["network.dns", "network.outbound"]
+optional = []
+forbidden = ["system.exec", "system.privileged"]
+
+[provides.operations.events_list]
+summary = "List scheduled events"
+capability = "calendly.events.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.events_list.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["api.calendly.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.events_list.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to list scheduled events for a user or organization"
+
+[provides.operations.events_get]
+summary = "Get a single event"
+capability = "calendly.events.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.events_get.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["api.calendly.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.events_get.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need details about a specific scheduled event"
+
+[provides.operations.event_types_list]
+summary = "List event types"
+capability = "calendly.events.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.event_types_list.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["api.calendly.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.event_types_list.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to see available event types for scheduling"
+
+[provides.operations.scheduling_links_create]
+summary = "Create a scheduling link"
+capability = "calendly.scheduling.write"
+risk = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.scheduling_links_create.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["api.calendly.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.scheduling_links_create.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to create a shareable scheduling link for an event type"
+
+[provides.operations.events_cancel]
+summary = "Cancel a scheduled event"
+capability = "calendly.events.write"
+risk = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.events_cancel.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["api.calendly.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.events_cancel.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to cancel a scheduled event"
+
+[sandbox]
+profile = "strict"
+memory_mb = 64
+cpu_percent = 25
+wall_clock_timeout_ms = 30000
+deny_exec = true
+deny_ptrace = true

+[format]
+type = "fcp-connector-manifest"
+schema_version = "2.1"
+
+[connector]
+id = "fcp.coda"
+name = "Coda"
+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "Coda document platform connector for managing docs, pages, tables, rows, and formulas"
+archetype = "operational"
+homepage = "https://coda.io/developers/apis/v1"
+
+[zones]
+home = "z:work"
+allowed_sources = ["z:work"]
+allowed_targets = ["z:work"]
+tailscale_tag = "tag:fcp-work"
+
+[capabilities]
+required = ["network.dns", "network.outbound"]
+optional = []
+forbidden = ["system.exec", "system.privileged"]
+
+[provides.operations.docs_list]
+summary = "List documents"
+capability = "coda.docs.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.docs_list.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["coda.io"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.docs_list.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to list Coda documents accessible to the user"
+
+[provides.operations.docs_get]
+summary = "Get a single document"
+capability = "coda.docs.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.docs_get.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["coda.io"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.docs_get.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need details about a specific Coda document"
+
+[provides.operations.docs_create]
+summary = "Create a new document"
+capability = "coda.docs.write"
+risk = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.docs_create.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["coda.io"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.docs_create.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to create a new Coda document"
+
+[provides.operations.rows_delete]
+summary = "Delete rows from a table"
+capability = "coda.tables.write"
+risk = "high"
+safety_tier = "dangerous"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.rows_delete.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["coda.io"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+max_redirects = 0
+
+[provides.operations.rows_delete.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "When you need to delete rows from a Coda table"
+
+[sandbox]
+profile = "strict"
+memory_mb = 64
+cpu_percent = 25
+wall_clock_timeout_ms = 30000
+deny_exec = true
+deny_ptrace = true

+[format]
+type = "fcp-connector-manifest"
+schema_version = "2.1"
+
+[connector]
+id = "fcp.hackernews"
+name = "Hacker News"
+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "Hacker News API connector for stories, comments, users, and job listings"
+archetype = "read-only"
+homepage = "https://github.com/HackerNews/API"
+
+[zones]
+home = "z:public"
+allowed_sources = ["z:public", "z:work"]
+allowed_targets = ["z:public"]
+tailscale_tag = "tag:fcp-public"
+
+[capabilities]
+required = ["network.dns", "network.outbound"]
+optional = []
+forbidden = ["system.exec", "system.privileged"]
+
+[provides.operations.item_get]
+summary = "Get an item by ID"
+capability = "hackernews.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.item_get.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["hacker-news.firebaseio.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+max_redirects = 2
+
+[provides.operations.user_get]
+summary = "Get a user by username"
+capability = "hackernews.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.user_get.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["hacker-news.firebaseio.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+require_tls = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+max_redirects = 2
+
+[provides.operations.top_stories]
+summary = "Get top story IDs"
+capability = "hackernews.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.new_stories]
+summary = "Get new story IDs"
+capability = "hackernews.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.best_stories]
+summary = "Get best story IDs"
+capability = "hackernews.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.ask_stories]
+summary = "Get Ask HN story IDs"
+capability = "hackernews.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.show_stories]
+summary = "Get Show HN story IDs"
+capability = "hackernews.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.job_stories]
+summary = "Get job story IDs"
+capability = "hackernews.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.health]
+summary = "Check HN API health"
+capability = "hackernews.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[sandbox]
+profile = "strict"
+memory_mb = 64
+cpu_percent = 25
+wall_clock_timeout_ms = 30000
+deny_exec = true
+deny_ptrace = true

+[format]
+type = "fcp-connector-manifest"
+schema_version = "2.1"
+
+[connector]
+id = "fcp.mastodon"
+name = "Mastodon"
+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "Mastodon social network connector for timelines, statuses, accounts, notifications, and search"
+archetype = "operational"
+homepage = "https://docs.joinmastodon.org/api/"
+
+[zones]
+home = "z:social"
+allowed_sources = ["z:social", "z:private"]
+allowed_targets = ["z:social"]
+tailscale_tag = "tag:fcp-social"
+
+[capabilities]
+required = ["network.dns", "network.outbound"]
+optional = []
+forbidden = ["system.exec", "system.privileged"]
+
+[provides.operations.timeline_home]
+summary = "Get home timeline"
+capability = "mastodon.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.timeline_public]
+summary = "Get public timeline"
+capability = "mastodon.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.statuses_get]
+summary = "Get a single status"
+capability = "mastodon.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.statuses_post]
+summary = "Post a new status"
+capability = "mastodon.write"
+risk = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.statuses_delete]
+summary = "Delete a status"
+capability = "mastodon.write"
+risk = "high"
+safety_tier = "dangerous"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.statuses_favourite]
+summary = "Favourite a status"
+capability = "mastodon.write"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+idempotency = "best_effort"
+
+[provides.operations.statuses_boost]
+summary = "Boost a status"
+capability = "mastodon.write"
+risk = "medium"
+safety_tier = "risky"
+idempotency = "best_effort"
+
+[provides.operations.accounts_get]
+summary = "Get an account by ID"
+capability = "mastodon.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.accounts_verify]
+summary = "Verify current user credentials"
+capability = "mastodon.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.notifications_list]
+summary = "List notifications"
+capability = "mastodon.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.search]
+summary = "Search Mastodon"
+capability = "mastodon.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations.health]
+summary = "Check instance health"
+capability = "mastodon.read"
+risk = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[sandbox]
+profile = "strict"
+memory_mb = 64
+cpu_percent = 25
+wall_clock_timeout_ms = 30000
+deny_exec = true
+deny_ptrace = true

Mastodon API types. + +use serde::{Deserialize, Serialize}; + +// ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── +// Account types +// ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── + +/// A Mastodon account. +#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)] +pub struct Account { + pub id: String, + pub username: String, + pub acct: String, + pub display_name: String, + #[serde(default)] + pub note: String, + pub url: String, + pub avatar: String, + pub header: String, + pub followers_count: u64, + pub following_count: u64, + pub statuses_count: u64, + #[serde(default)] + pub locked: bool, + #[serde(default)] + pub bot: bool, + pub created_at: String, +} + +// ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── +// Status types +// ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── + +/// A Mastodon status (toot). +#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)] +pub struct Status { + pub id: String, + pub uri: String, + pub url: Option, + pub content: String, + pub created_at: String, + pub account: Account, + #[serde(default)] + pub reblogs_count: u64, + #[serde(default)] + pub favourites_count: u64, + #[serde(default)] + pub replies_count: u64, + pub visibility: String, + #[serde(default)] + pub sensitive: bool, + pub spoiler_text: String, + #[serde(default)] + pub media_attachments: Vec, + #[serde(default)] + pub reblog: Option>, + #[serde(default)] + pub favourited: Option, + #[serde(default)] + pub reblogged: Option, + pub application: Option, + pub in_reply_to_id: Option, + pub in_reply_to_account_id: Option, +} + +/// Media attachment on a status. +#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)] +pub struct MediaAttachment { + pub id: String, + #[serde(rename = "type")] + pub media_type: String, + pub url: String, + pub preview_url: Option, + pub description: Option, +} + +/// Application that posted a status. +#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)] +pub struct Application { + pub name: String, + pub website: Option, +} + +// ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── +// Notification types +// ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── + +/// A Mastodon notification. +#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)] +pub struct Notification { + pub id: String, + #[serde(rename = "type")] + pub notification_type: String, + pub created_at: String, + pub account: Account, + pub status: Option, +} + +// ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── +// Search types +// ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── + +/// Search results from Mastodon. +#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)] +pub struct SearchResults { + pub accounts: Vec, + pub statuses: Vec, + pub hashtags: Vec, +} + +/// A Mastodon hashtag. +#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)] +pub struct Tag { + pub name: String, + pub url: String, + #[serde(default)] + pub history: Vec, +} + +/// Daily usage history for a tag. +#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)] +pub struct TagHistory { + pub day: String, + pub uses: String, + pub accounts: String, +} + +// ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── +// API error types +// ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── + +/// Mastodon API error response. +#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)] +pub struct ApiError { + pub error: String, + #[serde(default)] + pub error_description: Option, +} + +/// Instance info (used for health check). +#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)] +pub struct Instance { + pub uri: Option, + pub domain: Option, + pub title: String, + pub version: String, +} + +#[cfg(test)] +mod tests { + use super::*; + + #[test] + fn account_deserialization() { + let json = serde_json::json!({ + "id": "123456", + "username": "alice", + "acct": "alice", + "display_name": "Alice", + "note": "

Hello world

", + "url": "https://mastodon.social/@alice", + "avatar": "https://mastodon.social/avatars/alice.png", + "header": "https://mastodon.social/headers/alice.png", + "followers_count": 100, + "following_count": 50, + "statuses_count": 200, + "locked": false, + "bot": false, + "created_at": "2024-01-01T00:00:00.000Z" + }); + let account: Account = serde_json::from_value(json).unwrap(); + assert_eq!(account.id, "123456"); + assert_eq!(account.username, "alice"); + assert_eq!(account.followers_count, 100); + } + + #[test] + fn status_deserialization() { + let json = serde_json::json!({ + "id": "status_1", + "uri": "https://mastodon.social/users/alice/statuses/1", + "url": "https://mastodon.social/@alice/1", + "content": "

Hello Mastodon!

", + "created_at": "2024-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", + "account": { + "id": "123", + "username": "alice", + "acct": "alice", + "display_name": "Alice", + "url": "https://mastodon.social/@alice", + "avatar": "https://example.com/a.png", + "header": "https://example.com/h.png", + "followers_count": 10, + "following_count": 5, + "statuses_count": 3, + "created_at": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z" + }, + "reblogs_count": 5, + "favourites_count": 10, + "replies_count": 2, + "visibility": "public", + "sensitive": false, + "spoiler_text": "", + "media_attachments": [], + "in_reply_to_id": null, + "in_reply_to_account_id": null, + "application": null, + "reblog": null + }); + let status: Status = serde_json::from_value(json).unwrap(); + assert_eq!(status.id, "status_1"); + assert_eq!(status.visibility, "public"); + assert_eq!(status.favourites_count, 10); + } + + #[test] + fn notification_deserialization() { + let json = serde_json::json!({ + "id": "notif_1", + "type": "favourite", + "created_at": "2024-01-01T12:00:00.000Z", + "account": { + "id": "456", + "username": "bob", + "acct": "bob", + "display_name": "Bob", + "url": "https://mastodon.social/@bob", + "avatar": "https://example.com/b.png", + "header": "https://example.com/bh.png", + "followers_count": 5, + "following_count": 3, + "statuses_count": 1, + "created_at": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z" + }, + "status": null + }); + let notif: Notification = serde_json::from_value(json).unwrap(); + assert_eq!(notif.notification_type, "favourite"); + } + + #[test] + fn search_results_deserialization() { + let json = serde_json::json!({ + "accounts": [], + "statuses": [], + "hashtags": [{ + "name": "rust", + "url": "https://mastodon.social/tags/rust", + "history": [{ + "day": "1704067200", + "uses": "42", + "accounts": "15" + }] + }] + }); + let results: SearchResults = serde_json::from_value(json).unwrap(); + assert_eq!(results.hashtags.len(), 1); + assert_eq!(results.hashtags[0].name, "rust"); + } + + #[test] + fn api_error_deserialization() { + let json = serde_json::json!({ + "error": "Record not found", + "error_description": "The requested resource could not be found" + }); + let err: ApiError = serde_json::from_value(json).unwrap(); + assert_eq!(err.error, "Record not found"); + } + + #[test] + fn instance_deserialization() { + let json = serde_json::json!({ + "uri": "mastodon.social", + "title": "Mastodon", + "version": "4.2.0" + }); + let instance: Instance = serde_json::from_value(json).unwrap(); + assert_eq!(instance.title, "Mastodon"); + assert_eq!(instance.version, "4.2.0"); + } + + #[test] + fn media_attachment_deserialization() { + let json = serde_json::json!({ + "id": "media_1", + "type": "image", + "url": "https://mastodon.social/media/1.png", + "preview_url": "https://mastodon.social/media/1_small.png", + "description": "A photo" + }); + let media: MediaAttachment = serde_json::from_value(json).unwrap(); + assert_eq!(media.media_type, "image"); + } + + #[test] + fn status_with_reblog() { + let json = serde_json::json!({ + "id": "reblog_1", + "uri": "https://mastodon.social/users/bob/statuses/2", + "url": null, + "content": "", + "created_at": "2024-01-02T00:00:00Z", + "account": { + "id": "456", + "username": "bob", + "acct": "bob", + "display_name": "Bob", + "url": "https://mastodon.social/@bob", + "avatar": "https://example.com/b.png", + "header": "https://example.com/bh.png", + "followers_count": 5, + "following_count": 3, + "statuses_count": 1, + "created_at": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z" + }, + "reblogs_count": 0, + "favourites_count": 0, + "replies_count": 0, + "visibility": "public", + "sensitive": false, + "spoiler_text": "", + "media_attachments": [], + "reblog": { + "id": "original_1", + "uri": "https://mastodon.social/users/alice/statuses/1", + "url": "https://mastodon.social/@alice/1", + "content": "

Original toot

", + "created_at": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z", + "account": { + "id": "123", + "username": "alice", + "acct": "alice", + "display_name": "Alice", + "url": "https://mastodon.social/@alice", + "avatar": "https://example.com/a.png", + "header": "https://example.com/h.png", + "followers_count": 10, + "following_count": 5, + "statuses_count": 3, + "created_at": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z" + }, + "reblogs_count": 1, + "favourites_count": 0, + "replies_count": 0, + "visibility": "public", + "sensitive": false, + "spoiler_text": "", + "media_attachments": [] + } + }); + let status: Status = serde_json::from_value(json).unwrap(); + assert!(status.reblog.is_some()); + assert_eq!(status.reblog.unwrap().id, "original_1"); + } +}
